name: v31_v29_live_specialist_r3_lr12e6_ep035
note: v29 continuation and live-domain specialist. Use diverse evidence-grounded three-level CoT plus strict no-think direct answers for every live-target record, with item/user/general-rec guards. Goal: raise recommendation-live without losing v29's speed or other dimensions.

name: v32_v29_balanced_r3_draft_lr8e7_ep020
note: v29 continuation and balanced four-domain R3 specialist. Equalize live/ad/product/video target supervision and train concise individualized interest-evolution-task CoT plus route-correct direct answers. Goal: reduce video dominance and improve recommendation balance while retaining meaningful CoT.

name: v33_task_arith_v29_live55_r325
note: CoT-native task arithmetic from the shared v29 base; no v7 source.

name: v34_v29_paper_mix_lr5e7_ep10
note: Anchor run using a scaled OneReason-like R0/R3/general mixture plus old-task replay.

name: v35_v29_cot_r3_balanced_lr6e7_ep10
note: Higher R3 CoT ratio with compact Persona-Expansion-Transition traces and direct-route balance.

name: v36_v29_general_guard_lr4e7_ep12
note: General-heavy replay explicitly targeting the world-score forgetting seen in v31-v33.

name: v37_v29_r0_perception_lr6e7_ep10
note: R0-heavy bidirectional caption/SID grounding to improve item perception and downstream recommendation semantics.

name: v38_v29_r3_aggressive_lr7e7_ep10
note: Highest R3 share, trained on real temporal holdouts from official user profiles with target leakage blocked.

name: v39_v29_curriculum_r0_to_r3_lr6e7_ep08x2
note: Two-stage curriculum: 0.8 epoch R0/general alignment followed by 0.8 epoch R3/general cognition.

name: v40_scratch_source_paper_mix_lr3e6_ep15
note: High-risk restart from the official pretrained checkpoint using the new source-data mixture.

name: v41_v29_baseline_general_replay_lr4e7_ep10
note: Control run dominated by original competition supervision and general replay, with no profile-derived R3.

name: v42_v29_user_evolution_guard_lr5e7_ep10
note: Protects structured user extraction/evolution formats while adding real-holdout R3 and general replay.

name: v43_v29_paper_mix_low_lr25e7_ep15
note: Controlled long, low-LR exposure on exactly the same data as v34.
